Wolf Freedom of Religion or Belief Victims List Country Profiles Defending Freedoms Project Publications " class="we-megamenu-nolink"> Annual Reports Contact Us Facebook Twitter YouTube Instagram Search Saudi Arabia View the Saudi Arabia chapters in our annual reports > Recent News Events Publications Advising Government Religious freedom conditions in Saudi Arabia are particularly severe, as the government prohibits the public practice of any religion other than Islam and forbids all non-Muslim houses of worship. Judicial authorities penalize religious dissenters with arbitrary and egregiously long prison sentences, and they have executed hundreds of Shi’a Muslims for protesting religious freedom restrictions. State textbooks also continue to promote intolerance directed at different religious beliefs.
